period.timezone_note: Run date is 2026-07-10 KST. The public data/history.json local copy was stale/ignored, so the latest local history snapshot was used as the authoritative row source and restored as an ignored validation copy.

clusters.title: Game account linking and connection migration
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Discord와 외부 게임/앱 계정을 연결하거나 기존 연결 역할을 새 앱 연결 방식으로 옮기는 흐름을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe linking Discord to an external game or app account, or migrating older linked-role connections to an app-based connection.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js contains the in-game account-link prompt, while canary/d9c68492dffed875.js and canary/2d4796d662cb9eed.js contain linked-role migration copy.

clusters.title: Nitro restore and annual switch copy
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Nitro 구독 복원 또는 연간 결제로 전환하는 결제 흐름과 관련되어 있습니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings are tied to Nitro subscription restoration and annual-plan conversion copy.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js contains Restore Subscription and Nitro annual-plan copy; the standalone restored confirmation appears in the same history window.

clusters.title: Server Tag customization and visibility
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 서버 태그가 프로필에 어떻게 보이고, 태그를 수정하면 멤버가 다시 적용해야 할 수 있음을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings explain how a Server Tag appears on profiles and warn that edits can require members to reapply the tag.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js and canary/240ea547d50d3e72.js contain matching Server Tag labels and Korean management warnings.

clusters.title: Living Room notes and placement labels
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Living Room 안에서 노트를 남기거나 공간 배치를 조정하는 UI 라벨로 보입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings appear to label note-taking and placement controls inside the Living Room surface.
clusters.source_context: canary/74717365a102df6f.js contains the Living Room Note labels, and canary/801538cda8e8e434.js contains Living Room placement alongside spatial audio placement controls.

clusters.title: Server Discovery activity requirement warnings
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 서버가 Discovery 활동 요구 조건을 충족하지 못해 경고를 받거나 Discovery에서 제거될 수 있음을 알립니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings warn that a server has failed Server Discovery activity requirements and may be removed from Discovery.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js and canary/240ea547d50d3e72.js contain paired English/Korean Discovery warning copy for one-week, three-week, and removal states.

clusters.title: Game Shop desktop-only item redemption
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Discord Game Shop 또는 인게임 아이템 수령 흐름이 데스크톱, 계정 연결, 플랫폼 제한, 수령 기한과 연결되어 있음을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings show Discord Game Shop or in-game item redemption flows tied to desktop use, account linking, platform eligibility, and claim windows.
clusters.source_context: canary/316200a20e21b29c.js contains desktop-only Game Shop copy; canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js and canary/240ea547d50d3e72.js contain item redemption and platform eligibility copy.

clusters.title: Orbs bounties and Special Quests
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Special Quests, Bounties, Orbs 보상, 상점에서 쓸 Orbs 지급을 묶는 보상 흐름을 가리킵니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings point to reward flows involving Special Quests, Bounties, Orbs, and monthly Orbs for the Shop.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js and canary/240ea547d50d3e72.js contain Special Quests, Bounties, monthly Orbs, and badge-related reward copy.

clusters.title: Storefront draft publish status
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Discord의 storefront가 초안, 라이브, 예약 공개, 교체됨 같은 게시 상태를 갖는 관리 흐름을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe storefront management states such as draft, live, scheduled publish time, and replaced storefront.
clusters.source_context: canary/316200a20e21b29c.js and canary/996c272ba8a0cf1e.js contain the matching storefront status labels in English and Korean.

clusters.title: Family Center guardian connection invite
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 Family Center에서 보호자를 연결해야 계정 접근을 유지하거나, 보호자 초대를 보내고 수락하는 흐름을 설명합니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe Family Center flows where a guardian connection is required to keep account access or where a guardian invite is sent and accepted.
clusters.source_context: canary/72e466a601ffd778.js and canary/caaa5ea48e7bc64c.js contain matching guardian connection and invite copy.

clusters.title: Anti-raid unusual join and DM activity alerts
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 서버에서 비정상적인 참가 활동이나 DM 활동이 감지됐다는 안전/모더레이션 알림입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings are safety or moderation alerts for unusual join activity or unusual DM activity in a server.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js and canary/240ea547d50d3e72.js contain matching anti-raid detected copy.

clusters.title: Quick status labels on the You Bar
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 사용자가 빠르게 고르는 상태 라벨 묶음으로 보이며, 같은 창에서 “Down to Chat”은 추가됐다가 삭제되고 “Busy”는 “Working”으로 바뀌었습니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings appear to be a quick status label set, with Down to Chat added and then deleted in the same window and Busy changed to Working.
clusters.source_context: canary/74717365a102df6f.js contains Set your status with Gaming, Working, Chilling, and AFK; history shows Down to Chat was later deleted and Busy changed to Working.

clusters.title: YouTube channel name spacing error
clusters.summary: 이 문구는 연결된 YouTube 채널 이름 앞뒤에 공백이 있어 Discord 흐름을 계속할 수 없다는 오류입니다.
clusters.summary_en: This string is an error saying one connected YouTube channel name has leading or trailing spaces and the flow cannot continue until it is fixed.
clusters.source_context: canary/77464bd0f44539fb.js contains the YouTube channel-name spacing error and the instruction to update the name in YouTube Studio.

clusters.title: You Bar shortcut back to DMs
clusters.summary: 이 문구들은 You Bar에서 오른쪽으로 스와이프해 DM으로 더 빠르게 돌아가는 탐색 안내입니다.
clusters.summary_en: These strings describe a You Bar navigation shortcut for swiping right to return to DMs faster.
clusters.source_context: history.json contains the two You Bar DM navigation strings added together at 2026-07-07T21:29:42Z.

annotated_strings.value: Launch {applicationName} and link your account in-game.
You're currently using this Server Tag. This is how people will see you.
Swipe right on the You Bar to return to DMs.
This server has failed Discovery activity requirements for 1 week. If this server fails for 4 weeks in a row, it will be automatically removed from Discovery.
This server has failed Discovery activity requirements for 3 weeks in a row. If this server fails for 1 more week, it will be removed from Discovery.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has been removed from Server Discovery because it no longer passes all the requirements. Check [Server Settings]({onClick}) for more details.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has failed Discovery activity requirements for 3 weeks in a row. If it fails for 1 more week, it will be removed from Discovery.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has failed Discovery activity requirements for 1 week. If it fails for 4 weeks in a row, it will be automatically removed from Discovery.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has failed Discovery activity requirements for 3 weeks in a row. If it fails for 1 more week, it will be removed from Discovery.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has been removed from Server Discovery because it no longer passes all the requirements. Check [Server Settings]({onClick}) for more details.
[{guildName}]({onClickGuild}) has failed Discovery activity requirements for 1 week. If it fails for 4 weeks in a row, it will be automatically removed from Discovery.
Open this link in Discord on your desktop to continue.
Discord Game Shops are currently desktop-only
Everything you love about Nitro stays the same. One payment to make it official.
Same Nitro perks you already have. Switch once and you're set for the year.
Discord에서 연결된 보호자가 되려면 18세 이상이어야 합니다. 연결되면 청소년 자녀의 활동 정보를 확인하고 특정 설정을 관리하는 데 도움을 줄 수 있습니다. [자세히 알아보기]({link})
연결하면 보호자가 Family Center에서 회원님의 활동을 볼 수 있고, 회원님은 Discord를 완전히 이용할 수 있어요. [자세히 알아보기]({link})
이 스토어는 {timestamp}에 운영 개시되었으며 새로운 스토어로 대체되었어요.
서버 태그를 업데이트하면 모든 멤버가 프로필에 태그를 수동으로 다시 적용해야 해요. 남용을 방지하기 위한 조치예요.
bHook{connectionName}의 연결된 역할이 {date}부터 사용 중단될 예정이에요. 설정에서 연결된 역할을 마이그레이션해 주세요. bHook이후로는 더 이상 유지보수되지 않습니다.
서버 태그에 저장되지 않은 변경 사항이 있습니다. 이 페이지에서 나가면 변경 사항이 취소됩니다.
모든 현상금을 완료하면 +{orbAmount} Orbs가 지급되고 잠금이 해제돼요
이 스토어에는 예정된 운영 개시 시간이 없어요.
매달 {monthlyOrbsAmount} Orbs를 받아 상점에서 새로운 룩을 완성해 보세요.
이 아이템을 수락하려면 {applicationName} 계정과 Discord 계정을 연결하세요. PC에서만 사용할 수 있는 아이템이에요.
이 스토어는 운영 중이에요. 운영 개시일:{timestamp}
{numDays}일 이내에 아이템을 수령해야 해요. 이 기간이 지나면 아이템 액세스 관련 문제가 발생해도 지원해 드리지 못할 수 있어요.
이 아이템을 받으려면 {applicationName} 및 Discord 계정을 연결하세요. 이 아이템은 PC 및 Xbox에서만 사용할 수 있어요.
Orbs 보상을 추가로 획득할 수 있는 현상금이 더 지급될 수 있으니 나중에 다시 확인해 보세요.
계정에 대한 액세스 권한을 유지하려면 보호자와 연결하세요
현재 이 서버 태그를 사용 중이에요. 다른 사용자에게 이 모습으로 보일 거예요.
bHook{connectionName}의 연결된 역할은 {date}부터 더 이상 지원되지 않아요. 설정에서 연결된 역할을 업데이트해 주세요.
{username} 님이 Discord에서 보호자로 연결하라는 초대를 보내셨어요. {url}
향후 몇 개월 이내에 bHook{connectionName} 연결이 bHook{applicationName} 앱으로 마이그레이션돼요. 연결을 계속 유지하고 추가적인 [게임 내 소셜 기능]({helpCenterLink})을 잠금 해제하려면 [{applicationName} 계정을 연결하세요]({connectionEntrypointUrl}).
This draft has no scheduled publish time.
One of your **YouTube** channel names has leading or trailing spaces. [Update the channel name]({link}) in YouTube Studio and try again.

deferred.checked_context: Rechecked Family Center guardian QR/link sharing context; still a connector between QR and link options, not a standalone product term.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless future copy gives this connector independent product meaning.

deferred.checked_context: Rechecked Family Center guardian QR/link sharing context; still a connector between QR and link options.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless the key is repurposed into a concrete feature label.

deferred.checked_context: Rechecked current bundle; generic enabled state appears without a named public setting in the selected evidence window.
deferred.next_check_hint: Annotate only if future strings tie this key to a named public feature or setting.

deferred.checked_context: Korean row mirrors a generic enabled state; nearby storefront/developer copy does not make this label independently searchable enough.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless a future payload ties it to a specific setting name.

deferred.value: This flow has been disabled via developer tools
deferred.checked_context: Rechecked current bundle and Korean locale; wording points to developer tooling rather than a stable public recovery path.
deferred.next_check_hint: Recheck only if the same message appears in a public user flow with a concrete action or support path.

deferred.value: 개발자 도구를 통해 이 흐름이 비활성화되었어요
deferred.checked_context: Korean row mirrors the developer-tools disabled flow copy; no public user-facing remediation path was confirmed.
deferred.next_check_hint: Do not annotate unless future context shows a public flow and concrete user action.

deferred.checked_context: Appears in the same locale chunk as Living Room and status labels, but no surrounding public product meaning was confirmed.
deferred.next_check_hint: Recheck if future Living Room, sound, or avatar copy ties Duck to a concrete interaction.

deferred.checked_context: Appears near Server Tag badge color labels but is too generic without the adjacent color-picker label.
deferred.next_check_hint: Annotate only if a future row makes the color role independently searchable.

deferred.checked_context: Appears near Server Tag badge color labels but is a generic color-role word on its own.
deferred.next_check_hint: Keep deferred unless future copy ties it to a named Server Tag customization setting.

deferred.checked_context: A standalone label with potential profile/activity meaning, but no concrete consumer or related same-window copy was confirmed in this run.
deferred.next_check_hint: Recheck with profile, activity, or onboarding consumers before annotating.

search_signals.notes: Search Console was not used. Local history, public web JSON, latest_changes.json, and current Canary bundle snippets were sufficient for this run.

commands: scoped forbidden private/SEO/overclaim phrase scan on current-run analysis and string-context reports
validations.notes: All required JSON files parsed successfully; current-run analysis/report scan found no private paths, parser logic, tokens, SEO filler, or overclaim fix wording; git diff --check passed.

latest_changes.reason: Current data/latest_changes.json has empty string_changes dictionaries for en and ko, so no top-level string_context was added.

publish.notes: Publish status is reconciled after commit and push.
